  • Overview
  • Tree

  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Admin
    Represents an administrative user with elevated system privileges.
    Admin.Builder
    Builder implementation dedicated to constructing Admin instances.
    AdminMenuState
     
    AdminUserCreateSelectorState
     
    App
    Entry point of the application.
    AssignEmployeeState
     
    Clear
    Utility class providing system-level helper routines to clear the console terminal screen across different operating systems.
    Client
    Represents a client account, extending RegistrableUser with commercial metrics such as sector and business scale.
    Client.Builder
    Builder pattern implementation for cleanly generating Client instances.
    ClientMenuState
     
    DatabaseManager
    Central access point for all interactions with the SurrealDB database.
    DatabaseManager.DbFunctionCall
    A single argument call to a server-side SurrealDB validation function, used to check whether a given field value satisfies a DB-defined rule (e.g.
    DatabaseManager.NotificationRequest
    Describes a notification to be created and delivered to a target, which may be a specific user's RecordId or a broad role such as "ADMIN".
    DatabaseManager.UserCredentials
    Login credentials supplied by a user attempting to sign in.
    DBConnectionState
     
    DetailState<T>
     
    Email
    Orchestrator service class that handles sending system confirmation emails via secure SMTP channels.
    Employee
    Represents an employee within the system, expanding on RegistrableUser with professional details like specialization and start date.
    Employee.Builder
    Builder pattern implementation for creating structured Employee instances.
    EmployeeMenuState
     
    Equipment
    Tracks physical hardware or assets submitted for maintenance, managing manufacturing timelines, serial codes, and repair tracking fields.
    EquipmentCreateState
     
    EquipmentDetailState
     
    EquipmentListState
     
    EquipmentMenuState
     
    FirstInitState
     
    FormBuilder
    Builder utility for creating standardized Swing input forms using structured layout architectures.
    FormValidator
    Fluent interface builder utility for evaluating and aggregating client-side UI form input validation constraints alongside database checking routines.
    ImageService
    Service orchestrator providing integration endpoints for uploading profile attachments and downloading media graphics asynchronously using an external web HTTP API service.
    Input
    Core command-line terminal capturing engine that manages scanner input routines and handles exit sequences.
    ListState<T>
     
    Log
    Audit trail data record mapping specific events or technical system changes driven by explicit user activity.
    LogsListState
     
    ManagePartsMenuState
     
    ManageUsersMenuState
     
    MenuBuilder
    UI pattern helper for constructing standardized modular application menu panels with a center grid panel and an optional persistent header for notifications and profile information.
    Notification
    System alert message directed to targeted groups or single entities.
    NotificationDetailState
     
    NotificationListState
     
    Part
    Represents a spare part that can be used in equipment repairs, tracked with a stock quantity.
    PartsListState
     
    PressKey
    Utility containing console workflow blockers to pause program execution until explicit user acknowledgement.
    PropertiesManager
    Handles persistent configuration properties for the application, such as database connection credentials and settings stored in an external file.
    RegistrableUser
    Base class for users who register additional contact/identification details beyond the common User fields — namely Employee and Client.
    RegistrableUser.Builder<T>
    Base builder for RegistrableUser subclasses, adding the registrable-specific fields (NIF, phone, address) on top of User.Builder.
    Repair
    Tracks an individual technical maintenance job lifecycle, documenting cost metrics, scheduling milestones, and diagnostic details.
    RepairDetailState
     
    RepairListState
     
    RepairStatementPrinter
    Utility class for exporting historical repair milestones and log events into a formatted PDF statement using Apache PDFBox.
    RepairStatus
    Represents the lifecycle states a repair request can be in, from initial client submission through to completion or rejection at any stage.
    SignInState
     
    SignUpState
     
    State
     
    Text
    Internal text-formatting processor targeting multi-line word wrap alignments for console interfaces.
    User
    Abstract base class representing a generic user in the system.
    User.Builder<T>
    Abstract builder pattern implementation to support fluent inheritance across different user sub-types.
    UserCreateState
     
    UserDetailState
     
    UserEditState
     
    UserListState
     
    UserScale
    Represents the size/scale tier of a client organization, used to categorize clients for business purposes (e.g.
    UserSpecialization
    Represents an employee's specialization level, stored and displayed as a numeric string from 1 (lowest) to 5 (highest).
    UserStatus
    Represents the account status of a user, controlling whether they are able to sign in and use the system.
    UserType
    Represents the role a user account has within the system, determining which menus and actions are available to them.
    Validator
    Core validation helper targeting basic console string checks and database field constraints.
    ViewManager
    Utility class responsible for managing user interface component creation and layout configurations for Swing views.
